message: perf: cache user sessions in-memory to reduce DB round-trips
body:
Adds a HashMap-backed in-memory session cache in SessionCache.java.
Sessions are inserted on every order request and never evicted.
Intended to reduce latency by 30% on repeat customers.
No TTL or max-size configured — assumes session count stays bounded.

message: hotfix: add LRU eviction and max-size=10000 to SessionCache
body:
Emergency fix for OOM incident.
Replaces unbounded HashMap with LinkedHashMap with LRU eviction.
Max size set to 10000 entries. See ORD-312 for full remediation.
pr_title: hotfix: LRU eviction for SessionCache OOM
